benchmark_version_policy: stable_semver: plain X.Y.Z versions only; excludes prerelease, platform/system variants, and timestamp/internal builds
benchmark_min_version_reason: Versions before 1.11.0 either do not provide a usable openhands console script, lack clean headless/env override capture support, or exit in a clean HOME before producing a model request.

benchmark_exclusions.1.15.1: Broken dependency/import path for benchmark capture; CLI fails at startup with TypeError: observe() got an unexpected keyword argument 'rollout_entrypoint'.
